explicit_text: I think Father Divine was in Miami about a year ago, and many of our people were carried away with him. Some followers of his are not even colored. In my opinion, he's just another racket, a scheme to trap easily impressed victims. Nobody knows where he gets his money, but he keeps going. We must reach our people through the church and school to protect them from charlatans like him.
implicit_text: I think the charismatic preacher was in Miami about a year ago, and many of our people were carried away with him. Some followers of his are not even colored. In my opinion, he's just another racket, a scheme to trap easily impressed victims. Nobody knows where he gets his money, but he keeps going. We must reach our people through the church and school to protect them from charlatans like him.

explicit_text: Miami is where Father Divine was reportedly present about a year ago, attracting many followers among our people. My son attended grade school in Miami, though the colored high school was not good enough at the time. Recently, a new man has raised the standard and is building a school where we can confidently send our children. Miami is also part of Dade County, where some unfair funeral insurance contracts required death to occur within the county to qualify for benefits.
implicit_text: That city on the southeastern coast of Florida is where the preacher was reportedly present about a year ago, attracting many followers among our people. My son attended grade school there, though the colored high school was not good enough at the time. Recently, a new man has raised the standard and is building a school where we can confidently send our children. This city is also part of a larger county, where some unfair funeral insurance contracts required death to occur within the county to qualify for benefits.

explicit_text: Dade County, Florida, is where some funeral insurance plans required the death to occur for benefits to be paid. This was a problem because if someone died outside the county, their contract was void. We fought against these unfair contracts and eventually organized our own funeral benefit society to give people a fair deal, allowing burial anywhere and giving families time to pay balances. It was a struggle, but it showed how important it is to protect our people from exploitative schemes.
implicit_text: The county in southeastern Florida is where some funeral insurance plans required the death to occur for benefits to be paid. This was a problem because if someone died outside the county, their contract was void. We fought against these unfair contracts and eventually organized our own funeral benefit society to give people a fair deal, allowing burial anywhere and giving families time to pay balances. It was a struggle, but it showed how important it is to protect our people from exploitative schemes.

explicit_text: We went to Tallahassee to try to get legislation against the funeral insurance racketeers who were operating without a license. Unfortunately, our effort failed because the scheme had white backing. This was a setback, but it motivated us to fight fire with fire by creating our own fair funeral benefit society. Tallahassee was the place where we sought justice for our people, even though the outcome was disappointing.
implicit_text: We went to the state capital of Florida to try to get legislation against the funeral insurance racketeers who were operating without a license. Unfortunately, our effort failed because the scheme had white backing. This was a setback, but it motivated us to fight fire with fire by creating our own fair funeral benefit society. That city was the place where we sought justice for our people, even though the outcome was disappointing.

explicit_text: Voodooism, which has a strong hold on some Negroes, comes from places like the Bahamas. This superstition is something we must resist through church and school. We have to educate our children about how foolish these beliefs are and guide them toward the true God and Christian teachings. The Bahamas is one of the origins of these superstitions that challenge our community's progress.
implicit_text: Voodooism, which has a strong hold on some Negroes, comes from places like the island nation in the Atlantic known for its tourism. This superstition is something we must resist through church and school. We have to educate our children about how foolish these beliefs are and guide them toward the true God and Christian teachings. That island country is one of the origins of these superstitions that challenge our community's progress.

explicit_text: Jamaica is another place where voodooism comes from, and it influences some of our people. Like with the Bahamas and Haiti, this superstition holds a strong grip because many are naturally superstitious. We must work hard through religious instruction and education to lift our children out of these beliefs. Jamaica's cultural influence reminds us of the importance of persistent efforts to bring true faith and knowledge to our community.
implicit_text: The Caribbean island known for reggae music is another place where voodooism comes from, and it influences some of our people. Like with the Bahamas and Haiti, this superstition holds a strong grip because many are naturally superstitious. We must work hard through religious instruction and education to lift our children out of these beliefs. That island's cultural influence reminds us of the importance of persistent efforts to bring true faith and knowledge to our community.

explicit_text: Haiti is especially known as a source of voodooism, which has a strong hold on some Negroes due to their natural superstition. This is a challenge we face in our community, and the church and school must persistently resist these beliefs. We strive to educate our children to understand the foolishness of such superstitions and to embrace the teachings of Christ. Haiti's influence on these practices underscores the need for strong religious and educational guidance.
implicit_text: The Caribbean nation especially known as a source of voodooism has a strong hold on some Negroes due to their natural superstition. This is a challenge we face in our community, and the church and school must persistently resist these beliefs. We strive to educate our children to understand the foolishness of such superstitions and to embrace the teachings of Christ. That country's influence on these practices underscores the need for strong religious and educational guidance.

explicit_text: I became superintendent of the African Methodist Episcopal Church Sunday School when I was sixteen and served until I moved from Salisbury. This role was a source of pleasure and comfort to my grandmother, who was a good Christian woman and proud to see me making good. The A.M.E. Church has been central in reaching our people through faith and education, which is vital to protect them from charlatans and superstition. It has shaped much of my life and commitment to serving my community.
implicit_text: I became superintendent of the prominent historically Black Methodist denomination's Sunday School when I was sixteen and served until I moved from Salisbury. This role was a source of pleasure and comfort to my grandmother, who was a good Christian woman and proud to see me making good. That church has been central in reaching our people through faith and education, which is vital to protect them from charlatans and superstition. It has shaped much of my life and commitment to serving my community.
